arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola slams Man United fans for “lack of class”
arts.sum: City midfielder Phil Foden was targeted with insulting chants during the game, with a section of the United support singing derogatory songs about his mother. The point leaves Manchester City in fifth place, which will likely be good enough for Champions League qualification for next season.

arts.ttl: Man United ready to fight to the bitter end with Tottenham for 15-G/A forward
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are looking to improve their attacking unit in the summer, and they have identified Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth as a target. According to Fichajes, the two clubs are willing to pay €50 million in order to sign the player.
